pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 syntax and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 17-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may have annotation processing issues or incompatibilities with newer JDKs or Spring Boot 3's AOT/native requirements.
